summary: Iteration 11 testing completed. Backend: 17/20 tests passed (85%). 2 CRITICAL bugs found - model/server mismatch for KinshipCreateRequest and SubyardCreateRequest causing 500 errors on create_kinship and update_subyard endpoints. Ownership transfer, community members listing, announcements, budget plans CRUD all work correctly. Frontend loads correctly, transfer ownership UI visible for host users.

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - KinshipCreateRequest model missing 'related_to_name' and 'relationship_scope' fields that server.py expects at line 907
critical.root_cause: Model/server mismatch - models.py KinshipCreateRequest has: person_name, relationship_type, linked_user_id, birth_date, anniversary_date, last_seen_at, notes. Server expects additional: related_to_name, relationship_scope

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - SubyardCreateRequest model missing 'description', 'role_focus', 'inherited_roles', 'visibility' fields that server.py expects at line 877
critical.root_cause: Model/server mismatch - models.py SubyardCreateRequest has: name, purpose, icon, privacy, custom_roles, members. Server expects: name, description, inherited_roles, role_focus, visibility

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update models.py KinshipCreateRequest to add 'related_to_name: str = ""' and 'relationship_scope: str = ""' fields

FIX CRITICAL: Update models.py SubyardCreateRequest to change 'purpose' to 'description', add 'inherited_roles: bool = True', 'role_focus: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)', 'visibility: str = "shared"'
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG: Model/Server mismatch in KinshipCreateRequest - server.py line 907 accesses payload.related_to_name and payload.relationship_scope which don't exist in the model

CRITICAL BUG: Model/Server mismatch in SubyardCreateRequest - server.py line 852-861 and 874-879 access payload.description, payload.inherited_roles, payload.role_focus, payload.visibility which don't exist in model
Backend refactoring (db.py, models.py, dependencies.py extraction) was successful - existing endpoints still work
Ownership transfer flow works correctly - transfers owner, demotes old owner to organizer, blocks self-transfer, blocks non-host users
DELETE endpoints for announcements, budget-plans work correctly
PUT endpoints for announcements, budget-plans work correctly

success_rate.backend: 85% (17/20 passed - 2 failed due to model bugs, 1 skipped)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create disposable communities via /api/auth/bootstrap with TEST_ITER11_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested ownership transfer flow, edit/delete endpoints. CRITICAL: KinshipCreateRequest and SubyardCreateRequest models in models.py don't match what server.py expects - this causes 500 errors on POST /api/kinship and PUT /api/subyards/{id}. Main agent needs to align models with server expectations. Ownership transfer (POST /api/community/transfer-ownership) works correctly. Frontend transfer ownership UI is visible for host users at /settings page (data-testid='settings-transfer-ownership-card'). Login flow: /login -> click 'Sign in' tab -> fill email/password -> click 'Sign in' button.

passed: POST /api/community/transfer-ownership transfers owner to another member
GET /api/ root endpoint works after refactoring
Transfer ownership section visible in Settings for host users
failed: POST /api/kinship - 500 error due to model mismatch (missing related_to_name, relationship_scope)
PUT /api/subyards/{id} - 500 error due to model mismatch (missing description, role_focus, inherited_roles, visibility)
skipped: DELETE /api/chat/rooms/{room_id}/messages/{msg_id} - skipped due to chat message creation issues
not_tested: PUT /api/travel-plans/{id} - needs event_id which requires event creation first
